title: Moist Savory Norwegian Meat Stew
description: A hearty and flavorful stew featuring paprika and tender meat, perfect for a cozy evening, made without onions or garlic for a unique taste experience.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 300 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, toss the beef with paprika, salt, and pepper until the meat is evenly coated.
In a large mason jar, create a layer of carrots and potatoes.
Add the coated beef on top of the vegetables.
In a small bowl, mix the beef broth and tomato paste, then pour the mixture over the beef.
Add the bay leaves on top and close the mason jar lid.
Place the mason jar in the oven and bake for 2 1/2 hours.
Remove the mason jar from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes.
Serve the stew hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
